title: andruris andajensis
intro: Andruris andajensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, is also known as Androsace andajensis. This alpine plant is native to the Himalayan Mountains and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Tibetan medicine. Its leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Andruris andajensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
